title: NestJS application scaffold
description: Repository contains a runnable NestJS application following standard layout (modules, bootstrap, package scripts).
acceptanceCriteria: `pnpm install` and `pnpm run build` succeed; `pnpm run start` can boot the HTTP server.

title: OpenAPI / API schema
description: HTTP API is described with an OpenAPI surface (e.g. Swagger) so routes and DTOs are discoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: With the app running, OpenAPI JSON/doc UI is available at a documented path.

title: Database via Docker Compose
description: Docker Compose spins up a relational database used by the API in local development.
acceptanceCriteria: `docker compose up -d` provisions PostgreSQL; credentials are externalized via env.

title: Application database connection
description: Nest app connects to Postgres using configuration (env), not hard-coded secrets.
acceptanceCriteria: With DB up, app starts and exposes a health/readiness path that reflects DB connectivity.

title: Integration test harness
description: Automated integration tests validate HTTP + DB behavior against Postgres.
acceptanceCriteria: `pnpm run test:e2e` succeeds when database is reachable (documented prerequisites).

title: Security posture for scaffold
description: Dependencies and scaffold avoid obvious security foot-guns for a public template.
acceptanceCriteria: No secrets in repo; `pnpm audit` reviewed; security summary recorded in artifacts.
